x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The Crank agent runs jobs sent from Crank controllers.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information

options.name: --url
options.description: URL for Rest APIs.  Default is 'http://*:5010'.

options.name: --hostname
options.description: Hostname for benchmark server.  Default is 'runnervmrg6be'.

options.name: --docker-hostname
options.description: Hostname for benchmark server when running Docker on a different hostname.

options.name: --hardware
options.description: Hardware descriptor.

options.name: --dotnethome
options.description: Folder to reuse for sdk and runtime installs.

options.name: --relay
options.description: Connection string or environment variable name of the Azure Relay Hybrid Connection to listen to. e.g., Endpoint=sb://mynamespace.servicebus.windows.net;...

options.name: --relay-path
options.description: The hybrid connection name used to bind this agent. If not set the --relay argument must contain 'EntityPath={name}'

options.name: --relay-enable-http
options.description: Activates the HTTP port even if Azure Relay is used.

options.name: --hardware-version
options.description: Hardware version (e.g, D3V2, Z420, ...).

options.name: --no-cleanup
options.description: Don't kill processes or delete temp directories.

options.name: --build-path
options.description: The path where applications are built.

options.name: --build-timeout
options.description: Maximum duration of build task in minutes. Default 10 minutes.

options.name: --service
options.description: If specified, runs crank-agent as a service

options.name: --log-path
options.description: The path where the logs are written. Directory must exists.

options.name: --cert-client-id
options.description: Service principal client id for cert based auth

options.name: --cert-tenant-id
options.description: Service principal tenant id for cert based auth

options.name: --cert-thumbprint
options.description: Thumbprint for cert

options.name: --cert-path
options.description: Location of the certificate to be used for auth.

options.name: --cert-pwd
options.description: Password of the certificate to be used for auth.

options.name: --cert-sni
options.description: Enable subject name / issuer based authentication (SNI).
